speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Main bas... dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai. Ek ajeeb sa darr lag raha hai aur aankhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai. Aisa lag raha hai bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai... main theek se saans bhi nahi le paa rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the emotional overwhelm without pushing for the specific stressor content.
text: Tumhe abhi bohot ghabrahat ho rahi hai, aur main sun rahi hoon ki yeh panic tumhe puri tarah se gher raha hai. Dimaag ka blank ho jana aur saans lene mein takleef hona... yeh overwhelming feeling bohot bhaari hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Haan, bohot bhaari... main screen dekhti hoon toh sab dhundhla lagta hai. Pata nahi kya karoon, bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai. Main control nahi kar paa rahi apni dhadkan ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of the current moment feeling suffocating and out of control.
text: Is pal mein yeh sab kuch itna achanak aur tezi se mehsoos ho raha hai ki dhadkan pe kaabu pana bhi namumkin sa lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj subah laptop screen par ek EMI bounce ka notification dekha, aur tab se meri halat aisi hai. Main code ki ek line bhi nahi padh paa rahi hoon apni MNC ki job mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently inquire about the stressor now that it has been introduced after two restatements.
text: EMI bounce ka message dekhne ke baad se hi yeh sab shuru hua... kya us notification ne kisi aur badi chinta ko trigger kar diya hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki Papa ke cancer treatment ne already meri saari savings wipe out kar di hain. Abhi aur hospital bills aane wale hain aur account mein paise bilkul nahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the implied fear of not being able to manage upcoming critical expenses.
text: Peechle kuch waqt se tumhare upar itni badi zimmedari thi, aur ab savings khatam hone ke baad yeh dar lag raha hai ki aage ke hospital bills kaise handle honge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh darr hai. Papa ki halat, EMI, cancer ke kharche... in sab ke beech main code kaise likhoon? Agar performance giri toh job chali jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the dual role pressure of being a caregiver and a reliable IT professional.
text: Ek taraf beti hone ka poora farz nibha rahi ho, aur dusri taraf ek professional ki tarah MNC ka pressure bhi akele utha rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Farz toh nibhana hi hai na, badi beti hoon. Par andhar se bilkul toot chuki hoon. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod doon, par papa ko kaun dekhega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the exhaustion and feeling of being trapped by duty and financial debt.
text: Lagta hai itne saare role akele akele nibhate hue tum bilkul exhausted aur trapped mehsoos kar rahi ho, jaise aaram karne ka ya rukne ka koi haq hi na bacha ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahun toh kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakti. MNC mein sabko lagta hai meri salary itni achi hai. Agar dosto ko pata chala ki main kangal hoon, toh log kya kahenge?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue softly without asking a question.
text: Bahar se sabko tumhari achi job dikhti hai, toh unke saamne apni yeh financial struggle chupana aur akele jhelna pad raha hai tumko...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh chupana bahut bhaari lagta hai. Pata nahi, is waqt mujhe koi insurance claim ya financial plan bhi nahi sujh raha hai. Ekdum akela lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her exhaustion and isolation as a culturally normal response to medical/financial crises in metro cities.
text: Tumhara yeh akelapan aur exhaustion puri tarah se natural hai. Metro cities mein MNCs ki life aisi hi lagti hai jahan bahar se sab perfect dikhana padta hai, jabki andar cancer jaisi badi medical crisis ne sab hila diya ho. Tum is waqt jitna kar rahi ho, woh kisi ke liye bhi overwhelming hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin main fail nahi ho sakti, samajh rahe ho aap? Mere upar ghar aur papa dono chal rahe hain. Agar main aise panic karti rahi toh sab doob jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote from the IT/corporate world about the hidden burden of being the strong one.
text: Working professionals ke cases mein yeh 'I have to be strong all the time' wala burden bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki corporate world aur family dono humse perfection maangte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe ho. Perfection ki umeed ne hi toh mara hai. Par mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... abhi iss EMI aur panic ka ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, completable options to manage the immediate panic and technical issue without adding obligations.
text: Is waqt apna dimaag thoda shant karna zaroori hai. Ya toh hum abhi bank ke EMI grace period process ke bare mein thodi research kar sakte hain, ya phir tum paani peekar agle 5 minute ke liye screen band kar sakti ho. Tumhe inme se kya feasible lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Screen band karna toh thik hai... maine subah se paani bhi nahi piya. Ajeeb si baat hai na, code debug karte karte khud ko hi bhool gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her step-by-step through the chosen physical grounding action.
text: Pehle yeh karo... laptop ka lid abhi ke liye close kar do. Phir ek glass paani piyo aaram se. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye, baaki cheezein hum baad mein step-by-step dekhenge.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Okay, maine laptop close kar diya hai. Thoda sa better lag raha hai, woh notification baar baar aankh mein nahi chub raha. Par andar woh bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai, bas thoda halka sa kam hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the partial relief and the lingering anxiety duration.
text: Thoda sa distance lene se abhi us notification ka current stress kam hua hai, bhale hi andar ka panic puri tarah se gaya nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... aap jaante ho, mujhe darr lag raha tha ki HR ko pata chalega toh kya hoga. Financial instability ko MNCs bahut negatively dekhte hain aajkal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the financial instability caused by medical crisis as a structural issue with corporate provisions.
text: Medical emergencies ki wajah se aane wali financial instability ek structural issue hai, yeh tumhari personal failure nahi hai. Corporate HR policies mein bhi critical illness ke liye provisions aur employee assistance plans hote hain, jinhe discreetly explore kiya ja sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh main bhool hi gayi thi... shayad company ke portal par koi emergency assistance fund ho. Maine panic mein kuch dekha hi nahi tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize forgetting resources under high stress and validate her renewed thinking.
text: Aisa bhool jana bilkul swabhavik hai jab dimaag itne bhari medical bills aur family crisis mein fasa ho. Tum apne resources ko ab dreere-dheere phir se yaad kar pa rahi ho, yeh ek bohot positive step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Pata nahi, shayad main bank me bhi call kar ke baat kar sakti hoon ki EMI defer ho sakti hai kya. Papa ke reports attach kar dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her shift back into a capable problem-solver mindset.
text: Lagta hai ab tumhara panic thoda control mein aa raha hai, aur tum wapas ek problem-solver waali jagah se soch pa rahi ho, jo tumhari asli strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Problem-solving hi toh karna hai mujhe. Agar main ro kar baith gayi toh EMI apne aap toh nahi bhari jayegi. Mujhe hi solutions nikalne hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her acceptance of her duty/role without the earlier overwhelm.
text: Wapas apni badi beti aur breadwinner waali role mein aa gayi ho, jahan tumhe pata hai ki aage ka raasta tumhe hi nikalna padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... ye role aasan nahi hai, par choice bhi nahi hai. Waise, main bank customer care ka number nikalti hoon. Aaj sirf baat karke puch lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a practical way to manage the task without getting overwhelmed again.
text: Yeh ek bahut practical aur chhota step hai. Ek kaam aur kar sakti ho, customer care se baat karte waqt ek diary saath rakh lena taaki jo bhi options woh batayein, tum notes le sako aur baad mein aaram se soch sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: Accha idea hai. Main phone aur pen le aati hoon. Laptop abhi band hi rakhti hoon, pehle yeh bank wala issue samajh leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlight the positive consequence of taking things one step at a time.
text: Ab woh darr utna haavi nahi lag raha ki sab ek saath hath se nikal jayega, kyunki tumne ek clear priority set kar li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek saath sab nahi soch sakti abhi. Papa ka agla chemo next week hai, uske pehle financial thoda stable ho jaye toh main theek rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her newly found stability and clear timeline.
text: Lagta hai aane wale week ke liye tumhare andar ek stability aur clarity aa gayi hai, jo pehle wale andhere aur confusion ki jagah le rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Haan, clarification zaroori tha. Thank you meri baat sunne ke liye, ab lagta nahi ki bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai. Main isse handle kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praise her resilience and offer an open door for future support.
text: Mujhe tum par bahut garv mehsoos ho raha hai ki tumne us intense overwhelming feeling ka samna kiya aur apne liye raasta dhundh liya. Yaad rakhna, kabhi dobara heavy lage toh main yahan hoon.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon
text: Main aaj WFH isolation mein akele baith kar bas kaanp raha hoon. Pata nahi kya ho raha hai andar... bas ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon. Kuch logically soch nahi paa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the overwhelmed feeling quality without rushing to the stressor.
text: Akele kamre mein baith kar jab itna sab ek saath mehsoos hota hai, toh dimag ka sunn pad jana bahut natural lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon
text: Haan, jaise dimaag chalna band ho gaya hai. Ek ajeeb si ghabrahat hai, rona bhi nahi aa raha. Sach kahun toh bas ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon, blank baitha hoon laptop ke aage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration of the heavy blankness to encourage processing.
text: Kitne waqt se ye bhaari pan aur blankness ikattha ho rahi thi jo ab ek saath beh rahi hai tum par...

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah se jabse phone par EMI bounce ka message dekha hai. Mere paas paise nahi the account mein. Uske baad se lag raha hai sab collapse ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the feared consequence of the EMI bounce message.
text: EMI bounce ka message achanak dekh kar aage aane wali mushkilon ka darr ekdum se haavi ho gaya lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot zyada yaar. Mujhe agle mahine rent bhi dena hai. Mummy ke hospital bills bharne ke liye gaon ka khet aur gehne tak bech diye the maine, socha tha ab sab theek chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the sacrifices made as fulfilling a son's duty.
text: Mummy ki tabiyat ke liye tumne ek bete ka har farz nibhaya, apna sab kuch laga diya wahan bina soche...

speaker: Seeker
text: Par phir bhi ye debt spiral khatam hi nahi ho raha. Ek clear karo toh dusra khada ho jata hai. Gaon mein sabko lagta hai main badi IT MNC mein hoon, wahan kisse bolun? Log kya sochenge ki iski aisi haalat ho gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma protocol active, mirroring the fear of judgment gently.
text: Log kya sochenge, ye khayal bhi is akelepan mein ek aur bhaari bojh jaisa lag raha hoga...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon
text: Wahi toh. Ek toh waise hi WFH isolation ne bilkul akele kar diya hai. Dusra ye pressure ki life set dikhani hai. Andar hi andar itna darr hai, bas ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the contrast between outward appearance and inward suffocation.
text: Bahar se sab perfect dikhana aur andar se us panic mein ghutna, ye pressure sach mein sab kuch aur overwhelming bana deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exact wahi. Mujhe lagta tha salary aayegi toh sab math theek kar lunga, par jab calculations fail ho jati hain toh bohut darr lagta hai. Ekdum helpless feel ho raha hai ki main fail ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the underlying exhaustion caused by relentless responsibilities.
text: Lagta hai is lagataar zimmedari aur chup chap akele ladne ki wajah se ek bohut gehra exhaustion aa gaya hai tumhare andar, jahan ab umeed bhi thakne lagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul sahi baat boli. Thakan itni hai ki kabhi kabhi lagta hai system band karun aur bas kahin gayab ho jaun. Par mummy ko dekhta hoon toh lagta hai main peeche hat hi nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the struggle and validating the immense burden as culturally expected.
text: Itni badi zimmedariyan jaise hospital bills aur khet bikne ka stress akele handle karna kisi ke liye bhi bahut bhari hai. Tumhari thakan puri tarah jayaz hai, iska tumhari kabiliyat se koi lena dena nahi hai, bas halaat hi aise hain abhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaash mere papa hote, toh shayad gaon ke cases wo sambhal lete. Main bas IT ka banda hoon, finance aur debt trap manage karna mere bas ki baat hi nahi lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using brief systemic self-disclosure to reduce isolation in the IT/WFH context.
text: Humari IT field mein aur WFH set-up mein, ye over-responsibility aur akelepan ka bojh bohut common hai—sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai ye, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab apni 'set life' wali image maintain karna chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein yaar. Sabko lagta hai bahar sab theek hai. Par ab mujhe iss mental freeze se bahar nikalna hai. Ab kya karoon? Mujhe aage ka kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing two concrete, completable options to break the somatic freeze.
text: Is numbness se thoda bahar aane ke liye abhi bahut aage ka nahi sochna hai. Do chhote option hain: ya toh screen se uth kar 10 minute door jao aur ek glass paani peeyo, ya phir bas aankh band karke apna koi favourite gaana suno ek baar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main paani wala try karta hoon. Laptop ke saamne baith kar EMI aur rent hi loop mein ghoom rahe hain dimaag mein, usse break chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Executing one simple grounding step to bring Seeker back to the present.
text: Pehle laptop lid close karo… phir uth kar ek glass thanda paani peeyo… bas itna hi abhi ke liye, aur kuch dusra solve nahi karna aaj.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, done. Paani peeya maine aur thoda walk kiya. Dimaag mein thodi si shanti hui hai abhi, par rent aur EMI ka interest itna high hai ki usse kaise sort karunga?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the debt cycle as a structural issue rather than a personal failure.
text: Ye system ka hissa hai jahan debt aur banking structures aise design hote hain ki aadmi interest cycle mein ghoomta rahe. Ye tumhari individual failure nahi hai, balki system ka structure hi aisa complex hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Personal loan liya tha bills ke liye. Interest rate hi itna high hai ki principal amount toh hila hi nahi. Isliye har mahine pressure badh jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the chronic nature of the monthly stress cycle.
text: Matlab pichle kuch mahinon se jab bhi EMI ka din paas aata hoga, ye pura tension aur panic dobara se shuru ho jata hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Har mahine ki shuruaat mere liye nightmare hoti hai. So nahi paata us raat main theek se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep-seated fear of waking up to more bad news.
text: Neend is darr mein ud jati hogi ki subah uthte hi bank ka koi aur threat ya message na dekhna pad jaye...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Aur recovery walo ka call aaya toh main kya bolunga? Main unknown numbers uthana hi band kar chuka hoon. Main ab HR se advance salary maangne ka soch raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the underlying feeling driving the avoidance behavior.
text: Mujhe lagta hai avoidance ke piche ek bahut gehri ghabrahat hai, kyunki jab apne paas jawab na ho toh sawaal ka samna karna bohut dara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Mere paas unhe dene ke liye koi fix date nahi hai abhi. Par rent dena toh zaroori hai, isliye HR ko request toh karni hi padegi chahe sharam aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the Seeker's continuous effort to fulfill his role despite chaos.
text: Toh is pure chaos mein bhi tum ek zimmedar employee aur breadwinner ke taur par ghar bachane ka option nikalne ki poori koshish kar rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur kya karoon? Karna toh padega hi. Agar rent clear ho gaya toh kam se kam sir par chhat rahegi aur WFH chalta rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering a systemic reframe on prioritizing financial safety.
text: Financial crises mein aisi priority list banana hamesha helpful hota hai, aur rent ko sabse pehle secure karna ek bahut logical aur survival ke liye zaroori step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Main kal morning mein hi HR ko mail daalta hoon. Advance mil jayega toh EMI penalty thodi lag bhi gayi toh jhel lunga, kam se kam ghar toh bacha rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming the Seeker's practical decision-making and resilience.
text: Ye faisla lena aur apni priorities ko is mushkil waqt mein saaf rakhna tumhari practical samajh dikhata hai. WFH akelepan mein hote hue bhi tumne khud hi ek raasta nikal liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka lag raha hai ab ye baatein bol kar. Abhi bhi theek toh nahi hai sab, but at least sunn hone wala phase toot gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the subtle shift from numbness to slight momentum.
text: Wo jo overwhelming freeze tha shuruwat mein, wo ab thoda pighla hai aur dimaag mein thodi movement mehsoos ho rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main system shut down kar raha hoon aaj ke liye. Kal subah kaam par lagta hoon nayi clarity ke sath. Abhi ke liye bas rest karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Encouraging a restorative pause before tackling the next step.
text: Apne system ko thoda aaram dena aaj sabse zaroori step hai. Ek achhi neend lene ki koshish karo bina alaram ke, aur kal taza dimaag se wo HR wala mail dekhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon
text: Ek gehra despair hai jo mujhe saans nahi lene de raha. Pata nahi kya karun, main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon. Neighborhood mein sabko lagta tha ki main bohot bada aadmi ban gaya hoon, par ab is zillat ke bojh mein mujhe bas maut dikh rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional overwhelm and immediate helplessness while addressing the high risk flag with a safety check and helpline.
text: Tumhari baaton se lag raha hai ki dard itna gehra hai ki saans lena mushkil ho raha hai. Jab aisi ghutan hoti hai toh aise khayal aana samajh aata hai. Kya tum is waqt safe ho, ya koi aas-paas hai? Agar zyada akela feel ho, toh iCall (9152987821) par kisi se abhi baat kar sakte ho, main bhi yahin hoon.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main safe toh hoon, akele room mein hoon. Par dimaag fatt jayega mera. Woh jo ek hope thi na ki sab theek ho jayega, wo achanak toot chuki hai aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using duration mirror to reflect the sudden loss of hope, adhering strictly to the moderate risk protocol.
text: Umeed ka aise achanak toot jana sach mein bohot takleef deta hai, jaise sab kuch haath se fisal raha ho. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek kaise rahun? Startup mein layoff ka darr pehle se hi tha aur aaj EMI bounce ne meri bachi-kuchi himmat bhi tod di hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the fear due to mild risk flag, then mirroring the feared consequence of the financial instability.
text: Aise waqt mein darr lagna ekdum normal hai. EMI ka bounce hona aur layoff ki talwar latakna, yeh dono cheezein ek saath aana aur aage ka darr paida karna bohot darawana lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon
text: Haan, aur padosiyon ko lagta tha ki shehar aakar main settle ho gaya. Zillat mehsus ho rahi hai. Andar se main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational burden of neighbors' expectations and the shame associated with it.
text: Ghar walo aur padosiyon ki umeedon ka bojh uthana, aur ab unhe disappoint karne ka darr, yeh pressure sach mein sahan karna mushkil hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Maine socha tha IT sector me aakar achhi life set karunga. Ab lag raha hai main ek aise financial trap mein phans gaya hoon jahan se nikalna namumkin hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the duration of these dreams and how they have turned into an ongoing trap over time.
text: Shuruwat mein jo sapne itne sach lagte the, ab time ke saath unka ek darawna financial trap ban jana bohot heavy lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon
text: Ekdum sahi kaha aapne. Har din mail check karne me saans atak jaati hai ki HR ka message na ho. Main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon is dar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a question after multiple restatements to gently probe how the Seeker manages this acute daily anxiety.
text: Roz us darr ke saath uthna ki aaj corporate me kya hoga, yeh sach mein exhausting hai. Jab mail check karte waqt aisi ghabrahat hoti hai, toh us waqt tum khud ko kaise sambhalte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhal kahan pata hoon. Bas bed par ghanto pada rehta hoon. Overthinking me time nikal jata hai, aur loan ka interest dimaag me chalta rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the conflicting roles of being a professional while being frozen by financial responsibilities.
text: Ek taraf professional identity bachane ki koshish, aur doosri taraf financially sab handle karne ki zimmedari, yeh donon duty tumhe poori tarah freeze kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon
text: Image maintain karna sabse bada task ban gaya hai. Ghar par kisi ko pata nahi hai EMI ke baare mein, unhe lagta hai mera package laakhon ka hai. Main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon ye jhooth bol bol kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a short relational restatement with a soft pause to address the stigma cue around hiding financial failure.
text: Sabse yeh sacchai chhupana pad raha hai kyunki unki nazron mein tumhari success ki image alag hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... wo perfect image maintain karne ke chakkar mein maine khud ko akela kar liya hai. Par ab sach mein thak gaya hoon fake karte karte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep exhaustion that comes from maintaining a duty-bound fake persona while dealing with financial debt.
text: Lagta hai is fake identity ko sambhalte-sambhalte tum andar se poori tarah exhaust ho chuke ho, aur ab failure ka akelaapan bohot haawi ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein yaar. IT professionals ka yahi haal hai aajkal, par bahar sab chamak dikhti hai. Andar se EMI aur EMI ka darr hi dimaag me rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a brief systemic anecdote to normalise the hidden financial struggles within the corporate and metro sectors.
text: Corporate sector mein yeh dikhawa bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki society mein financial struggles par baat karna ek taboo mana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Sabko bas success story sunni hai. Kisi ko nahi pata ki next rent kaise jayega. Main waise hi panic me rehta hoon hamesha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the natural stress of living in a metro city and separating the Seeker's personal worth from their EMI status.
text: Rent aur EMI ka stress akele jhelna metro cities mein bilkul natural hai. Tumhari worth is EMI bounce ya corporate pressure se define nahi hoti, yeh sirf ek bada roadblock hai tumhare safar mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap sahi keh rahe ho. Par abhi ke liye ye phase darawana hai. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, koi raasta hai kya is ghabrahat se nikalne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, easily executable steps that do not add new obligations to help manage the immediate panic.
text: Ye ghabrahat kam karne ke liye hum kuch choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ek toh tum aaj sirf 5 minute khidki ke paas khuli hawa mein tahal sakte ho, ya phir phone ko thodi der switch off karke shant baith sakte ho. Konsa thoda doable lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Phone off karna behtar rahega. Notifications aur emails dekh kar hi saans phulti hai meri aajkal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking the Seeker step-by-step through the chosen suggestion to ground them.
text: Pehle yeh karo… apne phone ko flight mode par dalo aane wale 10 minute ke liye… phir bas aankhein band karke shanti se baitho… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thik hai, maine dnd mode on kar diya hai. Thoda better lag raha hai ye soch kar ki abhi koi mail nahi aayega agle 10 minute tak.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the layoffs and financial crunch as a structural corporate issue rather than a personal failure.
text: Yeh jaanna zaroori hai ki startups mein achanak financial crunches aur layoffs ek systemic problem hai corporate structure ki, yeh tumhari individual working capacity ka failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mehnat toh maine bohot ki thi yaar. Din raat ek kar diya tha pichle do saal. Phir bhi ye din dekhna pad raha hai is economy mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of losing trust in future career prospects despite immense hard work.
text: Itni mehnat ke baad jab result achanak aise palat jata hai, toh aage apne career par se bharosa uthna bohot swabhavik si baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon
text: Bharosa toh hila hua hai. Pehle toh main bas breakdown kar gaya hoon ye soch soch kar, par ab thoda grounded feel kar raha hoon aapse baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their capacity to find stability amidst chaos and separating their inner strength from corporate pressure.
text: Tumhara yeh thehrav mehsoos karna aur is sach ko face karne ki himmat jutana sach mein tareef ke kabil hai. Yeh tumhari inner resilience ko dikhata hai, jo is temporary setback se badi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal ghar walo se baat karni padegi shayad. Unko real situation bata dunga. Aur kab tak fake karunga, sach batana hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the role-based decision to step out of the fake persona and be honest.
text: Sach batane ka decision lena ek bohot mushkil aur bada kadam hai, taaki tum is perfect IT professional hone ke jhoothe dabaw se finally azaad ho sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur mere 1-2 college ke dost hain jinse thode time ke liye financial support maang sakta hoon. Zillat to hogi par koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggesting a small, concrete way to structure reaching out to friends for support.
text: Doston se baat karna ek acha backup option ho sakta hai. Tum ek choti si list bana sakte ho un 2 doston ki jin par tumhe pura trust hai aur jinhe sach batana thoda asaan lagega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rahul aur Amit hi hain aise. Unko kal call karunga, wo dono bhi metro me hi kaam karte hain, wo shayad situation ko samjhein bina judge kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the subtle emergence of hope as the Seeker formulates a practical plan.
text: Lagta hai un doston ke baare mein soch kar aur kal ka plan banne se tumhare andar thodi umeed wapas aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dar to abhi bhi hai, par wo maut wala extreme dar nahi hai ab. Kal subah uth kar bank se baat karunga is EMI ke bare me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their readiness to face the next day, emphasizing the progress made in the session.
text: Tumhara ye confidence dekh kar bohot reassurance mil rahi hai. Ek baar mein sirf aane wale ek din ko handle karna hi sabse acchi approach hai, aur tum kal ke liye tayaar lag rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhai... yahan is Tier-2 city ke flat mein akele baitha hoon... bas ek extreme guilt mehsus ho raha hai jisme dimaag bilkul sunn hai. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha ki kya karoon, bas andar hi andar roye ja raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the intense emotional overwhelm without pressing for details.
text: Mujhe sun kar hi lag raha hai ki tum abhi kitna bhari pan aur helplessness mehsoos kar rahe ho. Aise extreme guilt mein aake dimaag ka bilkul sunn pad jana, bohot thaka dene wala ehsaas hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak gaya hoon yaar, lag raha hai jaise maine apni family ko bohot bada dhokha diya hai. Sab kuch haath se nikal raha hai lagta hai... dimaag bilkul sunn hai, aage ka rasta poori tarah andhera hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the implied fear of losing everything and betraying the family.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki tumhari wajah se parivaar ko dhokha mila hai, aur sab kuch haath se nikal raha hai. Yeh darr ki ab sab khatam ho jayega, tumhe aur zyada blank kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki main sach mein nahi bacha paya apni family ki izzat. Pata nahi gaon mein ghar walon ko muh kaise dikhaunga. Dimaag bilkul sunn hai, kabhi kabhi darr lagta hai ki kuch extreme step na utha loon is guilt mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk thought gently, then mirror the feeling of overwhelm.
text: Aise waqt mein jab sab taraf andhera dikhta hai, toh dimaag mein extreme khayal aana ek aam baat hai. Parivaar ki izzat ka darr aur yeh gehra guilt tumhe itna pareshan kar raha hai ki aur kuch nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wo log gaon mein mujh par kitna bharosa karte hain. Aur main yahan is Tier-2 city mein bas apna dimaag bilkul sunn karke baitha hoon. Jo paise bhejta tha, ab uska bhi kuch clear nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role/duty frame as the stressor starts to slowly surface.
text: Ghar ka bada beta ya zimmedar insaan hone ke naate, unka jo bharosa tum par raha hai, wo ab tumhe ek bojh jaisa lag raha hai jab tum unhe support nahi kar pa rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh nahi hai, meri galti hai! Hospital mein saari savings chali gayi, phir maine remittance ke chakkar mein chit fund mein paise laga diye the. Aur ab loan default ho gaya hai. HR se bhi baat nahi kar sakta main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational constraints and isolation of not being able to talk to HR or family.
text: Ek taraf hospital aur chit fund ke losses aur doosri taraf office mein HR tak se yeh loan default wali baat chhipane ki majboori... yeh akelapan is guilt ko aur zyada bada kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly... office mein kisi ko bolunga to job pe baat aayegi. Ghar bolunga to izzat mitti mein mil jayegi, khet girvi rakhna padega. Dimaag bilkul sunn hai ki is loan default se kaise bachun akele.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed exhaustion of carrying the dual burden of job security and family honor.
text: Lagta hai ki tum chaaron taraf se phans gaye ho. Ek taraf job security ka darr aur dusri taraf parivaar ki izzat bachane ka pressure... yeh lagatar akele sab kuch handle karne ki koshish tumhe poori tarah se thaka chuki hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, sach mein thak gaya hoon akele ladte ladte. Kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakta, kyunki log kya kahenge ki kitna bewakoof hai jo is tarah ke fund mein paise duba diye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a brief restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Logon ki nazron mein hamesha ek zimmedar image banaye rakhne ka lamba silsila, aur us image ke tootne ka darr tumhe yeh baat kisi se baantne nahi de raha...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bola... failure sun ke log bas mazaak udate hain. Par ab bank ke recovery wale call kar rahe hain, meri himmat sach mein toot rahi hai akelepan mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his fear as normal for his region/category, and separate his worth from the financial mistake.
text: Tier-2 cities mein akele reh kar jab aisi recovery calls aati hain, toh darr aur akelapan lagna bohot aam baat hai. Par yaad rakhna, ek financial loss tumhari insaani value decide nahi karta; tumne toh family ke hospital kharch ko bharpai karne ke liye hi try kiya tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad tum theek keh rahe ho, maine apne aish ke liye thodi kiya tha. Par ab in recovery walo se kaise deal karu? Dimaag bilkul sunn hai aur office me HR ko call na chala jaye bas yahi tension hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the loan trap and stigma.
text: Mere doston mein, jo bahar shehar aake job karte hain, unme achanak medical bills ke baad loan trap mein phansna bohot common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki izzat ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein? Matlab main akela nahi hoon is trap mein? Thoda halka feel ho raha hai ye jaan kar. Bhai, abhi theek hona chahta hoon, koi raasta hai kya is recovery panic se thoda relief paane ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 simple, immediate options that fit his current constraints.
text: Hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain abhi. Pehla, apna phone thodi der silent par rakh do taaki har ring par panic na ho. Doosra, baad mein aaram se kisi free legal aid helpline ka number dekh sakte hain. Kaun sa step thoda theek lag raha hai aaj ke liye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Phone silent par rakhna thoda better lag raha hai abhi ke liye. Darr lagta hai ki missed call dekh kar unhe gussa na aaye, par abhi mere dimaag ko thodi shanti chahiye warna main pagal ho jaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle apne phone ko thodi der ke liye Do Not Disturb mode par daal do... phir bas ek glass pani piyo aur ek lambi saans lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Phone DND pe daal diya maine. Pehli baar thodi aawaz band hui hai dimaag ke andar. Par aage ka kya hoga yaar? Job ka darr lagataar bana hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe to shift blame away from his personal failing.
text: Aksar job security aur personal loans ka system aise banaya gaya hai ki middle-class migrant insaan hamesha ek pressure mein rahe. Yeh loan defaults ek bade structural issue ka hissa zyada hain, sirf tumhara akele ka personal failure nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye pressure wali baat ekdum sahi hai. Hum jaise log jo gaon se aake yahan baste hain, parivaar ka bojh bhi uthate hain aur yahan ke rents bhi. Kaise hoga sab manage?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time duration of his struggle.
text: Jab se tum yahan aaye ho, do-do jagah ka kharcha aur lagataar ghar walon ko support karne ka yeh lamba silsila chalta aa raha hai, usne tumhe dheere-dheere andar se nichod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, pichle teen saal se sirf paise bhej raha hoon. Apne upar ek dhang ki shirt tak nahi kharidi. Fir bhi end mein kya mila? Guilt aur wapas wahi dimaag bilkul sunn hai wali halat.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep exhaustion and grief over sacrificing everything.
text: Itne saalon ki mehnat aur khud ki zarooraton ko poori tarah maar kar jeene ke baad bhi jab nateeja aisa dardnaak nikalta hai, toh ek bohot gehri thakan aur nirasha aana laazmi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nirasha toh hai hi. Par kam se kam abhi tumse baat karke wo jo extreme chest mein heaviness tha aur panic tha, wo thoda settle hua hai. Pehle toh bas darr lag raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm his calming down and validate his initial panic as culturally natural.
text: Yeh bohot acchi baat hai ki panic thoda kam hua hai aur tum aaram se baat kar pa rahe ho. Tumhari jagah koi bhi izzatdaar insaan itne loans aur responsibilities ke beech aise hi ghabrata, yeh bilkul natural reaction tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks bhai. Kabhi socha nahi tha ki ye sab baatein aise khul ke kisi se kar paunga. Ghar ka bada aadmi hone ka pressure itna hai ki bas andar hi andar ghutna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his awareness of the duty-based role pressure.
text: Ek aadmi aur ghar ke breadwinner hone ke naate, hamesha strong dikhne ki ummeed ne hi tumhe apni saari pareshaniyan aur darr akele chupane par majboor kar diya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkull. Agar main hi kamzor pad gaya toh peeche parivaar ka kya hoga? Yehi soch kar bas kaam par laga rehta hoon, chahe dimaag kitna bhi sunn kyu na rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of family collapse.
text: Yahi sabse bada darr hai ki agar tumhari himmat toot gayi, toh pura parivaar bikhar jayega, isliye tum apni takleef ko daba kar aage badhte gaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Par ab lag raha hai ki mujhe us legal aid helpline se baat karni padegi. Is default ka settlement ya waqt mangne ka kuch toh raasta nikalna hoga legally.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift from isolation to seeking systemic help.
text: Ek naya raasta dhoondhne ka yeh faisla, aur akele chupne ke bajaye legally apni madad karne ki soch, tumhe wapas apne halaat ke baare mein thoda control de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle se kaafi sorted feel kar raha hoon ab. DND abhi bhi on hai. Thodi der mein in helpline walo ko pata karunga. HR wala darr abhi hai, par wo kal dekhunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time focus: tackling one thing today and leaving the rest for later.
text: Pehle khud ko thoda aaram dena aur uske baad sirf aaj ka kaam niptana, aur baaki ki pareshaniyon ko kal par chhod dene ki strategy, abhi ke liye bilkul sahi disha lag rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, step by step jaunga. Agar ekdum se sab ek sath sochunga toh wapas dimaag bilkul sunn ho jayega. Aaj ki raat kam se kam theek se sone ki koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of overthinking and validate his plan to rest.
text: Sab kuch ek saath sochne se wapas se wahi paralysis aur panic na aa jaye, isliye sirf aaj ki raat shanti se sone par focus karna tumhare liye sabse zaroori kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha
text: Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas rona aa raha hai aur darr lag raha hai ki sab kuch bikhar jayega. Bank ka ek alert dekh kar achanak mera dum ghutne laga hai, samajh nahi aata kya karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the emotional overwhelm (Lens F) to validate the intense panic and helplessness before the specific stressor is even named.
text: Sun ke lag raha hai ki aapke andar ek bohot bada toofan chal raha hai, aur yeh achanak aayi ghabrahat aapko poori tarah gher chuki hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main poori tarah toot chuki hoon. Raat bhar neend nahi aati, bas purane taane dimaag mein goonj rahe hain. Aisa lag raha hai main is toofan mein kahin phas gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duration of the struggle (Lens D) while adding a warm normalising line to address the mild risk flag of sleep deprivation.
text: Aisi baatein aur raat bhar ki neend ud jana waqai bohot thaka dene wala hota hai. Yeh taane aur overthinking shayad kaafi lambe waqt se chal raha hai, jisne aapko jagaye rakha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahun toh... woh sarkari naukri toh mili nahi, aur ab is software job ki salary aane se pehle hi papa ke hospital bills mein saaf ho gayi. Pata nahi is mahine ka baaki kharcha kaise nikalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the role/duty frame (Lens B) to acknowledge the newly surfaced stressor of managing family hospital bills and job pressures.
text: Ek taraf papa ki tabiyat aur hospital ka saara financial kharcha, aur doosri taraf naukri ki zimmedariyan... aap lagatar akele hi yeh saara dabaav utha rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele hi toh sambhalna padta hai. Ghar pe koi baat samajhne wala nahi hai. Jab bhi aage ki EMI ka sochti hoon, toh achanak mera dum ghutne lagta hai ki bank balance toh negative mein jaa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence (Lens E) of the EMI bouncing and the ensuing financial crisis.
text: Bina kisi aapsi support ke yeh sab financial planning karna... andar hi andar dar bana rehta hoga ki agar EMI bounce ho gayi toh aage ki situation aur zyada khaab ho jayegi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... aur agar EMI bounce hui toh aur penalty lagegi jo main afford nahi kar sakti. Maine UPSC ke liye itni mehnat ki, nahi hua toh yeh IT job li. Par sab waste lag raha hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod-chhad ke bas kahin gayab ho jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressed moderate risk flag strictly via restatement of emotional toll and closed with the mandatory safety check.
text: Yeh lagatar bojh aur lamba akelapan jhelte hue aisi feeling aana ki sab chhod ke kahin door chali jaun, bohot swabhavik hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha
text: Haan, main physically theek hoon, main khud ko kuch nahi karungi. Bas yeh bills aur taano ka darr itna zyada hai ki mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question after consecutive restatements to gently probe the deeper layer of the ongoing panic and isolation.
text: Yeh EMI aur lagatar chal rahe hospital kharcho ka pressure waqai aapko hila dene wala hai... in sab cheezon mein sabse zyada bhaari pan kis baat ka lag raha hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse badi ghutan is baat ki hai ki main rishtedaron ya family ko sach bol nahi sakti. Unko lagta hai meri life IT job mein set hai. Mujhe sharam aati hai yeh bolne mein ki main fail ho rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Followed stigma protocol by using a shorter restatement (Lens F) that ends in a soft pause.
text: Family ke samne apni asli sthiti na bata paana, aur is financial bojh ko akele hi andar dabaye rakhna kaafi ghutan bhara hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot ghutan bhara hai. Main sirf sabko support karna chahti thi aur expectations meet karni thi, par ab balance minus mein dekh kar bas rona aa raha hai ki sab kharab ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core emotion of exhaustion and helplessness under the weight of financial debt and family expectations.
text: Lagta hai ki is achhi beti banne ki koshish aur in saari akele uthayi hui zimmedariyon ne aapko poori tarah nichod diya hai, aur aap khud ko is debt ke jal mein bilkul bebas mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi kaha aapne. Bebasi hi hai yeh. Par mujhe lagta hai agar maine abhi thodi bhi himmat hari, toh papa ke aage ke medical bills kaise cover honge?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed her feelings of helplessness as normal given the unstable income and heavy family expectations, separating her worth from the financial crunch.
text: Private job ki current unstable economy aur uske sath ghar ki itni badi medical zimmedari jab ek sath aati hai, toh aisi bebasi mehsus hona bilkul laazmi hai. Aap apni taraf se pura try kar rahi hain, aur yeh financial crunch aapki mehnat ya kaabiliyat ko define nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin society ko kaun samjhaye? Woh toh ab bhi wahi taane maarte hain ki 'dekho, government job toh nikali nahi, ab private mein phas gayi'. Unki aisi baatein sunkar aur demotivated feel hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used systemic disclosure to normalize the pattern of corporate struggle and societal pressure among peers.
text: Corporate job karne walo mein yeh financial struggle aur relatives ke sarkari naukri wale taane bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sabko society mein apni ek 'successful' image banaye rakhni hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh successful wali image maintain karna hi sabse bada bojh ban gaya hai mere liye. Ab main bas theek hona chahti hoon... abhi mera focus sirf EMI aur kal ka hospital bill manage karne pe hai, koi chota rasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two practical, small-step options for managing immediate financial anxiety without adding burden.
text: Aage ka rasta thoda lamba zaroor hai, par abhi hum kuch chote aur aasan kadam le sakte hain. Ek option hai ki EMI deferment ke bare mein bank ko ek simple email likhein, ya phir sirf agle do din ke expenses ki list banayein taaki poora pahaad ek sath na dekhna pade.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bank ko email wala idea mujhe theek lag raha hai, usme kisi relative ko face nahi karna padega. Par usme kya details likhni hogi? Agar reject ho gaya toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked the Seeker step-by-step through the email writing process, breaking it down into manageable tasks for the day.
text: Pehle sirf apna loan account number aur bounce alert ka screenshot nikal ke laptop par rakho... phir ek simple draft likhenge email ke liye ki medical emergency ki wajah se thoda EMI deferment chahiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aaj raat ke liye itna toh main kar hi sakti hoon bina darre. Shayad deferment mil jaye toh salary tak ka waqt mil jayega. Par hospital mein jo pending amount hai uska kya karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided systemic reframe on medical debt to reduce self-blame, normalizing hospital billing assistance.
text: Bade medical expenses jab achanak aate hain, toh aisi financial instability ek structural problem hoti hai hamare system mein, yeh aapka koi mismanagement nahi hai. Kai baar hospital ki admin desk par billing installment ki medical schemes hoti hain jo is bojh ko thoda aasan kar sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Hospital walo ne pehle din installment ka option bola tha, par main apne aap ko bahut 'strong beti' dikhane ke chakkar mein akele sab bhugtan karne lag gayi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the shift in role perspective (Lens B) as she considers sharing the burden instead of carrying it all alone.
text: Pehle saara bojh akele uthane ki koshish karna, aur ab situation samajh kar hospital se scheme ki help lene ka man banana, yeh bhi toh aapki zimmedari nibhane ka hi ek naya tarika hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha... main hamesha akele sab figure out nahi kar sakti. Thodi institutional help maang lene mein sharam nahi aani chahiye mujhe. Par papa ko yeh baat batane ki himmat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational care (Lens C) embedded in her desire to protect her father from the financial reality.
text: Papa ko is financial tension se poori tarah door rakhne ki koshish, taaki unki bimari aur badh na jaye, yeh unke liye aapki deeply rooted care ko dikhata hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, unki tabiyat already bohot nazuk hai. Unhone meri UPSC coaching pe bohot saara paisa kharcha kiya tha, isliye ab meri duty banti hai ki main unhe paise ka stress na doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated the cultural norm of returning parental investment while gently noting how it leads to ignoring her own needs.
text: Maa baap ka bacchon ki padhai pe itna invest karna aur phir unhi expectations ka hum par pressure hona hamare culture ka hissa hai. Lekin unka stress kam rakhne ki is poori race mein aapka khud ko side kar dena kaafi natural response hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Apni health aur mind ke baare mein toh main bhool hi chuki hoon. Kabhi college dosto se bhi nahi milti kyunki bahar cafe gaye toh usme bhi bill dena padega. Bas office, hospital aur calculation.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duration and monotony of her current survival mode (Lens D).
text: Is lagatar aur anant cycle mein... sirf office ka kaam, hospital ke chakkar aur paise ginte ginte, na jaane kitne mahine beet gaye hain bina khud ke liye jiyey...

speaker: Seeker
text: Pichle chhe mahine se yahi rutine raha hai. Par sach kahun toh, aaj email wala aur hospital desk wala point discuss karke mujhe rona nahi aa raha abhi, thoda dimag shant lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence lifting slightly (Lens E) as she visualizes a structured path forward.
text: Kitna aaram lagta hoga jab dimag se aage aane wali financial disaster ka darr thoda sa kam hone lagta hai aur ek umeed banti hai ki kuch options bache hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan darr toh tha hi, par abhi at least ek practical step toh saamne dikh raha hai. Bank email ka draft banane ki soch ke hi thoda light feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered one more simple backup suggestion for the next day, ensuring it remains easy to execute.
text: Dimag mein thodi clarity aana sach mein bohot positive sign hai. Kal agar email par turant response na aaye, toh bank ke customer support par ek normal enquiry call bhi ki ja sakti hai as a backup.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi hai, main kal apne lunch break ke time helpline pe bhi baat kar lungi. Aaj ke liye at least email save karke main try karungi thoda theek se so sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closed the session with a supportive step-by-step review of the immediate nighttime plan to transition her to rest.
text: Bilkul sahi plan banaya aapne. Pehle sirf laptop kholna aur draft ko save karna... phir alarm lagana aur phone silent karke sidha sone ki koshish karna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.
